name: 2D Platformer Starter
description: A ready-to-customize 2D platformer with player movement, gravity, jumping, coin collection, and a basic level layout. Includes a CharacterBody2D player with animation states, TileMap-based level, collectible system with score tracking, and a simple UI overlay.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project configuration — display: 1280x720, physics: 2D default gravity 980, input map with move_left/move_right/jump actions

scenes/.main.tscn: Root scene — loads Level01 as child, manages game state transitions
scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D (capsule), AnimationPlayer (idle/run/jump/fall states)
scenes/.level_01.tscn: Node2D root — TileMap (ground/platforms), spawn point Marker2D, coin placements, Camera2D following player
scenes/.coin.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (animated rotation), CollisionShape2D (circle), collection signal emitter
scenes/.ui/hud.tscn: CanvasLayer — score Label, health bar TextureProgressBar, coin counter with icon

scripts/.player.gd: extends CharacterBody2D — SPEED=300, JUMP_VELOCITY=-450, gravity from ProjectSettings, _physics_process handles move_and_slide, coyote_time timer, animation state machine based on velocity
scripts/.coin.gd: extends Area2D — signal 'collected', on_body_entered triggers collection animation then queue_free, emits signal for score tracking
scripts/.game_manager.gd: extends Node (autoload) — score tracking, level management, restart logic, pause handling
scripts/.hud.gd: extends CanvasLayer — connects to game_manager signals, updates score label and health display

assets/.placeholder_player.png: 32x32 character spritesheet (4 frames: idle, run1, run2, jump)

preBuiltMechanics: Gravity and jumping with coyote time
customizationPoints: Player speed, jump height, gravity multiplier
Add enemies by creating new Area2D/CharacterBody2D scenes
Add power-ups by extending the coin.gd pattern
examplePrompts: Make me a platformer where a cat collects fish
Build a Mario-style jumping game with enemies
Design a platformer with double jump and wall sliding
